---
title: "RMSE Decomposition Table"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
```

```{r compute}
# ── Configuration ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Place this Rmd in the same folder as the pair_scores/ directory.
# pair_scores/ should contain subfolders:
#   scenario_1_sparse_independent/full/
#   scenario_1_sparse_independent/no_network/
#   scenario_1_sparse_independent/no_horseshoe/
#   scenario_2_network_structured/...
#   scenario_3_dense_weak_noise/...

n_reps   <- 50   # number of replicates to use
scenarios <- list(
  sc1 = list(dir = "scenario_1_sparse_independent",
             label = "1: Sparse Independent"),
  sc2 = list(dir = "scenario_2_network_structured",
             label = "2: Network Structured"),
  sc3 = list(dir = "scenario_3_dense_weak_noise",
             label = "3: Dense Weak Noise")
)
models <- c("full", "no_network", "no_horseshoe")
model_labels <- c(full = "Full", no_network = "No-network",
                  no_horseshoe = "No-horseshoe")

# ── Compute RMSE subsets for each scenario × model × replicate ────────────
results <- list()

for (sc_name in names(scenarios)) {
  sc_dir   <- scenarios[[sc_name]]$dir
  sc_label <- scenarios[[sc_name]]$label

  for (model in models) {
    rmse_sig  <- numeric(0)
    rmse_null <- numeric(0)
    sens_fdr  <- numeric(0)

    for (rep in seq_len(n_reps)) {
      fname <- file.path(
        "pair_scores", sc_dir, model,
        sprintf("pair_scores_%s_rep%03d_%s.rds", sc_dir, rep, model)
      )
      if (!file.exists(fname)) next

      ps <- readRDS(fname)

      # RMSE on true-nonzero pairs
      sig_idx  <- ps$true_assoc
      null_idx <- !ps$true_assoc

      if (sum(sig_idx) > 0)
        rmse_sig  <- c(rmse_sig,
                       sqrt(mean((ps$beta_hat[sig_idx] -
                                  ps$beta_true[sig_idx])^2)))
      if (sum(null_idx) > 0)
        rmse_null <- c(rmse_null,
                       sqrt(mean((ps$beta_hat[null_idx] -
                                  ps$beta_true[null_idx])^2)))

      # Sensitivity at matched FDR <= 10%
      ord <- order(-ps$sign_prob)
      tp  <- cumsum(ps$true_assoc[ord])
      fp  <- cumsum(!ps$true_assoc[ord])
      fdr <- fp / (tp + fp)
      valid <- which(fdr <= 0.10)
      if (length(valid) > 0) {
        k <- max(valid)
        sens_fdr <- c(sens_fdr, tp[k] / sum(ps$true_assoc))
      } else {
        sens_fdr <- c(sens_fdr, 0)
      }
    }

    results[[paste(sc_name, model)]] <- data.frame(
      scenario      = sc_label,
      model         = model_labels[model],
      rmse_signal   = mean(rmse_sig),
      rmse_null     = mean(rmse_null),
      sens_fdr10    = mean(sens_fdr),
      n_reps        = length(rmse_sig)
    )
  }
}

res <- do.call(rbind, results)
rownames(res) <- NULL
```

```{r table}
# Bold the best value per metric per scenario
res_display <- res %>%
  group_by(scenario) %>%
  mutate(
    best_sig  = rmse_signal == min(rmse_signal),
    best_null = rmse_null   == min(rmse_null),
    best_sens = sens_fdr10  == max(sens_fdr10)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    rmse_signal_fmt = ifelse(best_sig,
      paste0("\\textbf{", sprintf("%.3f", rmse_signal), "}"),
      sprintf("%.3f", rmse_signal)),
    rmse_null_fmt = ifelse(best_null,
      paste0("\\textbf{", sprintf("%.3f", rmse_null), "}"),
      sprintf("%.3f", rmse_null)),
    sens_fmt = ifelse(best_sens,
      paste0("\\textbf{", sprintf("%.3f", sens_fdr10), "}"),
      sprintf("%.3f", sens_fdr10))
  ) %>%
  select(scenario, model, sens_fmt, rmse_signal_fmt, rmse_null_fmt)

# Print as LaTeX table
cat("\\begin{table}[H]\n")
cat("\\centering\n")
cat("\\small\n")
cat("\\begin{tabular}{llccc}\n")
cat("\\toprule\n")
cat("Scenario & Model & Sens.\\ at FDR$\\le$10\\% & ",
    "RMSE$_\\beta^{(\\text{signal})}$ & RMSE$_\\beta^{(\\text{null})}$ \\\\\n")
cat("\\midrule\n")

prev_sc <- ""
for (i in seq_len(nrow(res_display))) {
  row <- res_display[i, ]
  sc  <- row$scenario
  n_sc <- sum(res_display$scenario == sc)
  if (sc != prev_sc) {
    cat(sprintf("\\multirow{3}{*}{%s}\n", sc))
    prev_sc <- sc
  }
  cat(sprintf(" & %s & %s & %s & %s \\\\\n",
              row$model, row$sens_fmt,
              row$rmse_signal_fmt, row$rmse_null_fmt))
  # Add midrule between scenarios (not after last)
  next_sc <- if (i < nrow(res_display)) res_display$scenario[i+1] else ""
  if (sc != next_sc && i < nrow(res_display))
    cat("\\midrule\n")
}

cat("\\bottomrule\n")
cat("\\end{tabular}\n")
cat("\\caption{Threshold-based pair-level evaluation ($n=", n_reps,
    "$ replicates, mean values). ",
    "Sens.\\ at FDR$\\le$10\\% $=$ sensitivity of the largest selected set ",
    "satisfying FDR $\\le$ 10\\% using posterior sign probability $q_{gd}$; ",
    "RMSE$_\\beta^{(\\text{signal})}$ $=$ RMSE on the truly associated pairs; ",
    "RMSE$_\\beta^{(\\text{null})}$ $=$ RMSE on the truly null pairs. ",
    "Bold $=$ best per metric per scenario.}\n", sep="")
cat("\\label{tab:rmse-decomp}\n")
cat("\\end{table}\n")
```
